TENTATIVE RULING: Grant without hearing.
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna K. Mannion for San Francisco Public Administrator, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court inquired as to whether there were any objections to the instant petition. No objections were raised. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will. The lost will dated November 16, 2022, is admitted to probate. The San Francisco Public Administrator is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed with full IAEA authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for March 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
